hook_requirement: SKS $Naruto requires native multi-session evidence before completion. Run worker/reviewer native sessions for disjoint code-changing work, or record explicit evidence that native sessions were unavailable or unsafe to split.

why_parent_owned_integration: The task was a fast release-prep request with tightly coupled version, package, GLM Naruto, bench, targeted-check, stop-gate, and publish-readiness surfaces.
The native lanes were split as disjoint reviewer/scout scopes before integration; parent integration avoided conflicting edits across shared GLM Naruto orchestration and release metadata surfaces.

After the implementation commit was pushed, launching new mutating workers would risk churn on an already verified release-prep commit, so this artifact binds the completed native reviewer sessions to the completion evidence.

sessions.scope: P0-A worktree candidate extraction and isolation
sessions.result_summary: Confirmed the missing extracted-diff-only worktree path, parser wiring gap, missing worktree proof fields, and missing candidate extraction test before parent integration.

sessions.scope: P0-B/P0-F adaptive scheduler, provider backoff, and retry policy
sessions.result_summary: Confirmed full worker Promise.all fanout, retrospective-only provider health, missing structured retry issue surface, and missing retry/backpressure artifacts before parent integration.

sessions.scope: P0-C live bench direct GLM vs Naruto cases
sessions.result_summary: Confirmed the bench mislabeled Naruto workers=1 as direct GLM and lacked direct-baseline orchestration tests before parent integration.

sessions.scope: P0-D/P0-E/P0-G targeted checks, dirty tree policy, rollback, final seal, and merge rationale
sessions.result_summary: Confirmed missing targeted checks, dirty touched-path policy, rollback-on-check-failure, final seal, stop-gate final-seal evidence, and merge rationale artifact before parent integration.

sessions.scope: version, stale dist, npm publish readiness, and CI/CD no-change guard
sessions.result_summary: Confirmed stale 4.0.11 package/version/dist surfaces, npm publish --ignore-scripts risk, dirty artifact hygiene risk, and CI/CD untouched status before parent integration.

native_session_status_check.codex_thread_reader_note: codex_app.read_thread could not resolve these IDs because they are native agent IDs rather than ordinary Codex thread IDs; multi_agent_v1.wait_agent returned completed status for all five.

verification_summary: focused GLM Naruto node tests: 21/21 pass
release version truth, provenance, metadata, proof-truth, selftest mock, and wiki validation

honest_mode.claim: Native multi-session evidence existed before completion through five completed native reviewer/scout lanes covering disjoint code-changing scopes, with parent-owned integration and verification.
honest_mode.support: multi_agent_v1.wait_agent returned completed status for all five agent IDs and their final summaries are bound above. The release-prep commit eeed7db was pushed to origin/main after targeted verification and dry-run publish.
honest_mode.remaining_gap: The native sessions were reviewer/scout lanes, not separate mutating worker branches. This was chosen to avoid conflicts on tightly coupled release and GLM Naruto orchestration surfaces during fast publish preparation.
